pages.raw_text:
Spokane may yet secure its own
electric lightning plant eventually.
On motion Of Councilman Funk the
board of works was instructed to
proceed with the gathering of data
and accordingly have set City En-
gineer Ralston to work on the
proposition. The engineers duties
just at present are too numerous
for him to devote any time to COM
piling figures showing approximate
expense Of the undertaking, but he
will get busy on it soon. He will
then submit his report to the board
of works, which will submit 1t to
the council without recommends
ton.


The report will show whether 1t
is an advisable undertaking or not.
The w. w. P. monopoly is now
getting thousands of dollars every
year out of the city for lighting,
charging 81 a month for each arc
lamp. When Charles Mcintyre was
city engineer he discouraged the
city light project.
